game_info.title: Mob Control
game_info.concept: **Mob Control** Players control a cannon at the bottom of a multi-lane battlefield, using a tap-and-hold or swipe gesture to aim and continuously fire small units, typically 5-10 per second, up the lanes. The core mechanic involves strategically aiming these units through various multiplying gates (e.g., x2, x3, +50 units) to rapidly increase mob size before they engage enemy units and attack the opponent's base. Players can also deploy special "Champion" units, unlocked via a card system, which possess higher health (e.g., 100 HP) and damage (e.g., 10 DPS) to break through enemy lines. The objective is to destroy the enemy's base (e.g., 500 HP) before they destroy the player's base, with battles ending upon base destruction. Winning battles earns "Championship Stars" which advance the player through a league system, and "booster packs" containing cards to unlock and upgrade unit types, increasing their stats by 5-10% per level. Difficulty scales by increasing enemy mob spawn rates, introducing stronger enemy unit types, and presenting more complex gate layouts that require precise aiming.
game_info.description: Command your cannon to fire waves of units up multi-lane battlefields! Strategically aim through multiplier gates (x2, x3, +50) to amplify your forces before they clash with enemies. Deploy powerful Champion units to break through defenses. Your mission: destroy the enemy base (500 HP) before they destroy yours. Earn Championship Stars and unlock card packs to upgrade your units and dominate higher leagues!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Aim cannon left/right
Space: Fire units continuously (hold to keep firing)
Z: Deploy Champion unit (costs 100 units)
Shift: Speed boost for next wave (costs 50 units)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement and firing mechanics. Validates that the cannon can aim in different directions and fire units successfully. Verifies that units spawn, move up lanes, and interact with gates properly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Systematically sweep the cannon left and right while continuously firing units. Test firing through different lanes to verify unit spawning and movement. Alternate between different aiming angles to ensure responsive controls.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Units should spawn consistently when firing, move up their respective lanes, and respond to gate multipliers. The game should handle continuous firing without errors. Position and state tracking should be accurate throughout.
TEST_1.description: Tests basic movement and firing mechanics. Validates that the cannon can aim in different directions and fire units successfully. Verifies that units spawn, move up lanes, and interact with gates properly.

TEST_1.expected: Units should spawn consistently when firing, move up their respective lanes, and respond to gate multipliers. The game should handle continuous firing without errors. Position and state tracking should be accurate throughout.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the optimal winning strategy by maximizing unit multiplication and strategic Champion deployment. Validates win condition achievement and proper game phase transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Focus fire through high-multiplier gates (x3, +50) to rapidly build unit count. Deploy Champions strategically when enemy resistance is high. Use speed boosts to overwhelm enemy defenses. Concentrate fire on lanes leading to enemy base.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Should successfully destroy enemy base (reduce HP to 0) through strategic unit multiplication and Champion deployment. Game should transition to GAME_OVER_WIN state. Final score should reflect efficient strategy with minimal player base damage.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests defensive capabilities and resource management under pressure. Validates that the game properly handles situations where player must balance offense and defense while managing unit resources.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Initially hold back on firing to let enemy units approach. Then deploy calculated bursts of units and Champions to test collision detection and combat mechanics. Monitor resource levels and use abilities strategically.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Should demonstrate proper enemy-player unit collision, combat calculations, and base damage mechanics. Resource management should prevent overuse of abilities. Game should handle simultaneous unit interactions without errors.
